title: mysite
text:
Use Quarto to Render
1. Edit .qmd files and _quarto.yml
2. Close folder in vscode
3. Run 'quarto render' in terminal
4. Reopen folder in vscode and git files
5. Open <https://chunkaowang.github.io/>
